rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALICIA NICOLE TITUS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/12/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No courtesy copies. No proposed order. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7., and 14.59 E.] The proof of service filed on 4/25/22 showed the incorrect hearing date. (The hearing on 5/9/22 was for status of filing a petition either to close the estate or to ask for additional time for estate administration. In any event, serving notice on 4/25/22 for a hearing on 5/9/22 would not have been sufficient notice. And the pleading was actually e-filed on 4/26/22, when it was first available for viewing. Notice should not be mailed before the filing [e-filing] of the pleading requiring notice.) Courtesy copies of the petition and proof of service of the (correct) Notice of Hearing and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/3/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DENISE JOSEFINA CASTILLO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petition has been pending since March 2022. In May 2022, the personal representative of the conservatee's estate was appointed to receive final distribution from this conservatorship. The last updated examiner notes were e-mailed to the conservator's attorney on 06/03/2022, but have not been addressed since. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SALLY CHRISTINE OWENSBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/12/22 (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: A petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed by showing the distributee's name and description of the property, including the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) distributable to each beneficiary. [CRC 7.651; LRSF 14.35 I.6.] Probate Code Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary has PREVIOUSLY BEEN confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. The petition for final distribution must state the date on which notice to the Franchise Tax Board was mailed pursuant to Probate Code Sect. 9202(c). [LRSF 14.35 I.2.] Attorney costs (Exhibit B to the petition) must be fully described as to what was filed or sent by messenger, etc. No waiver of accounting was filed by the heirs or the representative of the heirs. The register of actions does not reflect a withdrawal of the Request for Special Notice by the DHCS; however, it appears that notice was given to that agency. (The proof of service identified the personal representative as "Special Administrator" and "Administrator. She was appointed Administrator with Will Annexed.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address this issue must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/3/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. (The hearing on 2/3/21 was in connection with the petition to make certain disbursements. The order filed on 2/5/21 authorized those disbursements; it did not rule on the date of death. Ms. Barfield was appointed Special Administrator in the later case on 1/17/20, not 1/8/20, and those Letters were extended by an order dated 2/10/20 until the real property was sold, although she never obtained actual Letters. She was appointed Administrator with Will Annexed on 10/19/20, not 12/23/20.) Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RESTATED SANDRA A. HUGGINS 1989 TRUST u/d/t September 12, 1989
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For Invalidation, Accounting, Removal Of Trustee, Surcharge, Return Of Trust Asets, And Financial Elder Abuse
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/31/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory & Appraisal By Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ESTATE OF WAYNE H. ALBA

rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGE CHRISTOPHER STOLL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 9/21/2015. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required. Status of closing the estate will be set for 8/14/23. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 8/14/23, no appearance will be required on 8/14/23.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID I-H. SHAW
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. No conformed copy of signed order will be returned (no self-addressed stamped envelope provided). Petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration must be filed by 08/07/2023. If not on file, appearance required at status hearing set for 08/21/2023.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/03/2022, as the hearing calendar is full.

rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY** IN THE MATTER OF THE KEYBEN ZOE LAGOS CARCAMO SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Create Special Needs Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The opening paragraph of the petition identifies Solange Pacheco, the guardian ad litem for the minor appointed in the related civil action, as the petitioner. However, the petition was only signed and verified by Pamela Blattner, as the proposed trustee. 2) The proof of service filed on 07/08/2022 shows notice of the hearing (DE-120 form) was mailed to the Departments of Health Care Services, Developmental Services, and State Hospitals, without a copy of the petition. Probate Code section 3611(c). 3) The proposed trustee is a professional fiduciary in Encino, California, to whom a citation order appears to have been issued by the Professional Fiduciary Bureau in 2018 for various violations relating to her services as trustee of a special needs trust. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENNETH CHRISTOPHER LAWSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 8/15/22 for filing the confidential attachment to the duties and liabilities form. this petiiton will require an appearance as the amount of the potential IRS debt is unknown and petitioner seeks appointment with full authority and minimum bond. in addition, the court to consider the issue of the unknown identity of the decedent's child notwithstanding 6451. filing deadline in order to avoid an automatic continuance is noon on 8/8/22.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT WHITE ANBIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/29/2022. Notes were e-mailed to counsel on 07/25/2022, even though no courtesy copy of the petition had been received. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID GOLDMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/14/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities or the Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number has been filed, the latter, confidentially and conventionally. The petition caption is incomplete if IAEA authority is being requested. Not all persons named in the will are listed in item 8 of the petition. They must also receive notice. [Probate Code Section 8110(b).] If the original will is lost, both mailed and published notice must clearly indicate that the petition seeks to admit a LOST will. [LRSF 14.20.] A non-resident personal representative is required to post bond. [LRSF 14.16 F.] A copy of the lost will must be lodged as with an original will. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/2/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
